name: Wegovy (Semaglutide)
tagline: FDA-approved weekly injection for chronic weight management
description: Wegovy (semaglutide) is an FDA-approved prescription medication for chronic weight management in adults. It works by mimicking a hormone that regulates appetite, helping you feel full sooner and reduce caloric intake.
shortDescription: Weekly injection for significant, sustained weight loss
howItWorks: A licensed physician reviews your health history
Prescription sent to a licensed pharmacy
benefits: Average 15% body weight loss in clinical trials

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results?
faqs.answer: Most patients begin to see results within the first 4 weeks, with significant weight loss typically occurring over 16-20 weeks of treatment.

faqs.question: Is Wegovy covered by insurance?
faqs.answer: Many insurance plans cover Wegovy for eligible patients. Our team can help verify your coverage during the consultation process.

faqs.question: Do I need a prescription?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wegovy requires a valid prescription from a licensed healthcare provider. Our online physicians can evaluate and prescribe if appropriate.

name: Ozempic (Semaglutide 1mg)
tagline: Originally for type 2 diabetes, widely used for weight management
description: Ozempic is a once-weekly injectable medication originally approved for type 2 diabetes that has shown remarkable results for weight loss. It helps regulate blood sugar and reduces appetite.
shortDescription: Once-weekly GLP-1 medication for weight and blood sugar control

faqs.question: What is the difference between Wegovy and Ozempic?
faqs.answer: Both contain semaglutide, but Wegovy is FDA-approved specifically for weight loss at a higher dose (2.4mg), while Ozempic is approved for type 2 diabetes at lower doses (0.5–1mg).

faqs.question: How is it administered?
faqs.answer: Ozempic is injected once a week using a pre-filled pen, usually in the abdomen, thigh, or upper arm.

name: Sildenafil (Generic Viagra)
tagline: The trusted ED treatment, now available online
description: Sildenafil is the active ingredient in Viagra — the most prescribed ED medication in the world. It helps increase blood flow to achieve and maintain an erection.
shortDescription: Same active ingredient as Viagra at a fraction of the cost
howItWorks: Answer a few health questions online
benefits: Same as brand Viagra, lower cost

faqs.question: Is it as effective as Viagra?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sildenafil is the exact same active ingredient found in Viagra. Generic versions are FDA-approved and bioequivalent to the brand-name product.

faqs.question: How fast does it work?
faqs.answer: Sildenafil typically starts working within 30–60 minutes. For best results, take it on an empty stomach.

name: Finasteride (Hair Loss)
tagline: Clinically proven to stop hair loss and regrow hair
description: Finasteride is an FDA-approved oral medication that prevents hair loss by blocking DHT, the hormone responsible for male pattern baldness. Clinical studies show it stops hair loss in over 83% of men.
shortDescription: Daily pill that stops and reverses male pattern baldness
benefits: Stops hair loss in 83% of men
Regrows hair in up to 66% of men

faqs.question: When will I see results?
faqs.answer: Most men see results within 3–6 months. Maximum results are typically seen after 12 months of consistent use.

faqs.question: What happens if I stop taking it?
faqs.answer: If you stop taking finasteride, hair loss will resume and hair gained may be lost within 12 months.

name: Birth Control Pill
tagline: Convenient online prescription for oral contraceptives
description: Get a prescription for the birth control pill that's right for you, delivered to your door. Our physicians offer a wide range of combined and progestin-only pills based on your health profile.
shortDescription: Online prescription for your preferred oral contraceptive

faqs.question: Which pill will I be prescribed?
faqs.answer: Our physicians select the most appropriate pill based on your health history, preferences, and medical needs. You'll discuss options during your consultation.

faqs.question: How quickly does it start working?
faqs.answer: It depends on when you start the pill in your cycle. If you start on day 1 of your period, you're protected immediately.

name: Tretinoin Cream
tagline: The gold standard in anti-aging skincare
description: Tretinoin is a prescription-strength retinoid that has been clinically proven to reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and hyperpigmentation. It's the most studied topical anti-aging ingredient available.
shortDescription: Prescription retinoid cream for anti-aging and acne

faqs.question: How long does it take to work?
faqs.answer: Most patients see initial improvements within 6–12 weeks. Optimal results for anti-aging and deep wrinkles can take 6–12 months.

faqs.question: Can I use tretinoin if I have sensitive skin?
faqs.answer: Yes, but we recommend starting with a lower concentration. Our dermatologists can prescribe the right strength for your skin type.

name: Anxiety Treatment (SSRI)
tagline: Clinician-managed anxiety and depression treatment online
description: Our mental health program pairs you with a licensed clinician who evaluates your symptoms and, when appropriate, prescribes FDA-approved SSRIs or SNRIs for anxiety and depression.
shortDescription: Online evaluation and prescription management for anxiety
howItWorks: Video or async consultation with clinician

faqs.question: Is this a replacement for therapy?
faqs.answer: Medication can be very effective for anxiety and depression, but it works best in combination with therapy. We can help coordinate both.

faqs.question: How quickly do SSRIs work?
faqs.answer: SSRIs typically take 4–6 weeks to reach full effectiveness, though some patients notice improvements within 2 weeks.

name: Sleep Support Program
tagline: Evidence-based sleep treatment including prescription options
description: Our sleep program starts with a detailed sleep assessment and pairs you with a physician who can recommend behavioral changes, OTC sleep aids, or prescription sleep medications as appropriate.
shortDescription: Personalized sleep treatment from evaluation to prescription

faqs.question: What kind of medications might be prescribed?
faqs.answer: Depending on your assessment, physicians may prescribe trazodone, zolpidem, or other evidence-based sleep aids, or recommend OTC melatonin with behavioral strategies.

name: Testosterone Therapy
tagline: Restore energy, muscle, and drive with TRT
description: Low testosterone (low T) affects millions of men and causes fatigue, decreased libido, muscle loss, and brain fog. Testosterone Replacement Therapy (TRT) can help restore levels to a healthy range.
shortDescription: Medically supervised testosterone replacement for low T
howItWorks: Order an at-home lab test kit
Test results reviewed by a physician

faqs.question: How do I know if I have low testosterone?
faqs.answer: Common signs include fatigue, low libido, difficulty concentrating, and muscle loss. A blood test is the only way to confirm low testosterone levels.

faqs.question: What forms of TRT are available?
faqs.answer: We offer injectable testosterone cypionate and topical testosterone gel, depending on your preference and medical suitability.

name: Menopause HRT
tagline: Relief from hot flashes, night sweats, and mood changes
description: Hormone Replacement Therapy (HRT) can significantly reduce the most disruptive symptoms of menopause, including hot flashes, night sweats, vaginal dryness, and mood changes.
shortDescription: Personalized hormone therapy for menopause symptom relief
benefits: Reduces hot flashes by up to 75%

faqs.question: Is HRT safe?
faqs.answer: For most healthy women under 60 within 10 years of menopause, the benefits of HRT outweigh the risks. Your physician will assess your individual health profile.

faqs.question: What types of HRT do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer patches, gels, oral pills, and vaginal formulations depending on your symptoms and preferences.
